notes:
## What's new in v1.2.0

### New Features
- **Tray popup**: compact amber pill `↑ v1.2.0` in the header — no more modal overlay blocking the popup
- **Dashboard**: sticky update banner at the top with **Update Now** and **1h snooze** — persists after app reopens so you don't miss an update
- **Dock icon**: WattsOrbit now appears in the Dock when the dashboard is open, disappears when it's closed
- Bell "Update" item now opens the dashboard instead of showing a modal in the tray

> **Pre-release** — install to test the v1.2.0 → v1.x update flow before stable release.
> Stable users on v1.1.x will NOT be prompted to update (latest.json points to v1.1.1).
